styleGuidelines:
## Brand & Style
The design system is built for a premium, high-stakes hospitality environment, evoking the atmosphere of a luxurious hotel bar or an exclusive nightclub.

## Elevation & Depth
Depth is achieved through Tonal Layering and Glassmorphism rather than traditional heavy shadows. Surfaces use Deep Obsidian (#0B0F19) and Slate (#1E293B) with glowing cyan and neon violet accents.
